children.overview: A financial adviser drags his family from Chicago to the Missouri Ozarks, where he must launder $500 million in five years to appease a drug boss.
children.title: Ozark

children.name: Sherlock (2010)
children.overview: A modern update finds the famous sleuth and his doctor partner solving crime in 21st century London.
children.title: Sherlock

children.name: Squid Game (2021)
children.overview: Hundreds of cash-strapped players accept a strange invitation to compete in children's games—with high stakes. But, a tempting prize awaits the victor.
children.title: Squid Game

children.name: Stranger Things
children.overview: When a young boy vanishes, a small town uncovers a mystery involving secret experiments, terrifying supernatural forces, and one strange little girl.
children.title: Stranger Things

children.name: The Mandalorian (2019)
children.overview: After the fall of the Galactic Empire, lawlessness has spread throughout the galaxy. A lone gunfighter makes his way through the outer reaches, earning his keep as a bounty hunter.
children.title: The Mandalorian

children.name: The Walking Dead
children.overview: Sheriff's deputy Rick Grimes awakens from a coma to find a post-apocalyptic world dominated by flesh-eating zombies. He sets out to find his family and encounters many other survivors along the way.
children.title: The Walking Dead

children.name: The Witcher
children.overview: Geralt of Rivia, a mutated monster-hunter for hire, journeys toward his destiny in a turbulent world where people often prove more wicked than beasts.
children.title: The Witcher

children.name: Avengers - Endgame (2019) (1080p BluRay x265 10bit Tigole).mkv
children.overview: After the devastating events of Avengers: Infinity War, the universe is in ruins due to the efforts of the Mad Titan, Thanos. With the help of remaining allies, the Avengers must assemble once more in order to undo Thanos' actions and restore order to the universe once and for all, no matter what consequences may be in store.
children.title: Avengers: Endgame

children.name: Captain America - Civil War (2016) (1080p BluRay x265 10bit Tigole).mkv
children.overview: Following the events of Age of Ultron, the collective governments of the world pass an act designed to regulate all superhuman activity. This polarizes opinion amongst the Avengers, causing two factions to side with Iron Man or Captain America, which causes an epic battle between former allies.
children.title: Captain America: Civil War

children.name: Despicable.Me.2010.1080p.BluRay.x265-RARBG.mp4
children.overview: Villainous Gru lives up to his reputation as a despicable, deplorable and downright unlikable guy when he hatches a plan to steal the moon from the sky. But he has a tough time staying on task after three orphans land in his care.
children.title: Despicable Me

children.name: Eternals (2021) (1080p BluRay x265 10bit Tigole).mkv
children.overview: The Eternals are a team of ancient aliens who have been living on Earth in secret for thousands of years. When an unexpected tragedy forces them out of the shadows, they are forced to reunite against mankind’s most ancient enemy, the Deviants.
children.title: Eternals

children.name: No.Exit.2022.INTERNAL.1080p.WEB.h264-RUMOUR.mkv
children.overview: Stranded at a rest stop in the mountains during a blizzard, a recovering addict discovers a kidnapped child hidden in a car belonging to one of the people inside the building which sets her on a terrifying struggle to identify who among them is the kidnapper.
children.title: No Exit

children.name: Parasite (2019).1080p.BluRay.x265.10bit.TrueHD.7.1-Qman[UTR].mkv
children.overview: All unemployed, Ki-taek's family takes peculiar interest in the wealthy and glamorous Parks for their livelihood until they get entangled in an unexpected incident.
children.title: Parasite

children.name: Spider-Man - No Way Home (2021) (1080p BluRay x265 10bit Tigole).mkv
children.overview: Peter Parker is unmasked and no longer able to separate his normal life from the high-stakes of being a super-hero. When he asks for help from Doctor Strange the stakes become even more dangerous, forcing him to discover what it truly means to be Spider-Man.
children.title: Spider-Man: No Way Home

children.name: Spider-Man - Far from Home (2019) (1080p BluRay x265 10bit Tigole).mkv
children.overview: Peter Parker and his friends go on a summer trip to Europe. However, they will hardly be able to rest - Peter will have to agree to help Nick Fury uncover the mystery of creatures that cause natural disasters and destruction throughout the continent.
children.title: Spider-Man: Far From Home

children.name: Zack.Snyders.Justice.League.Justice.Is.Gray.2021.1080p.HMAX.WEB-DL.DDP5.1.Atmos.H.264-TOMMY.mkv
children.overview: Determined to ensure Superman's ultimate sacrifice was not in vain, Bruce Wayne aligns forces with Diana Prince with plans to recruit a team of metahumans to protect the world from an approaching threat of catastrophic proportions.
children.title: Zack Snyder's Justice League
